exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hold at 20kg. Dropped to 9 reps on set 3 last time (RPE 10) — target 11 consistent across all sets.

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.notes: Progress to 42.5kg. Hit 3x10 at RPE 8 on 40kg last time — earned the bump.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.notes: Standardize all sets at 40kg. You bumped to 40 on sets 2-3 last time — start there now for all 3.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Add 5kg DBs each hand. Hit BW 3x10 at RPE 7 last time — ready for load. Knee-safe depth only.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel
exercises.notes: Hold BW. RPE 9 last time — maintain 3x8.
